title: Chunk Loading Wobble
description: This resource pack makes the chunk loading animation wobbly
body:
# Chunk Loading Wobble
Makes chunk loading animation wobbly.

![The animation showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7432c4a09b3b42d3c2ffb48a421fcf5691008fa5.gif)
## How does it work?
This resource pack uses **core shaders** to change the position of the vertices in **terrain.vsh** vertex shader depending on **ChunkVisibility** parameter.
